label: Client Con Firmware Capture
info: Captures hardware=... firmware/version strings reported by screenless MCU devices on /api/iot/client/con and stores them on the matching kiosk module in Firebase. Import this flow, then add a side link-out from the existing /api/iot/client/con handler to the link-in node. Do not replace the existing auth route.

name: Wire a side link-out from the existing /api/iot/client/con handler into this link-in. This records firmware; it does not answer the auth request.
info: Expected incoming message is the existing Node-RED HTTP message for /api/iot/client/con. The flow reads msg.req.query.uuid and body/payload hardware=..., finds the matching kiosk module by modules[].id, and updates modules[].firmwareVersion/modules[].fotaVersion. If a vendor-confirmed auth uuid differs from the MQTT module id for the same physical module, set flow.clientConFirmwareModuleAliases, for example {"AUTH_UUID":"MQTT_MODULE_ID"}. If no kiosk is matched, it upserts pending/<uuid> with the reported version.

name: Extract uuid + hardware version
Build Firebase version write
Route firmware write mode
